div.h1: Raft Concurrent Failure & Safety Verification Flow
div.p: TDD Module: build-raft-m5 Objective: Continuous verification of Raft invariants under randomized chaos.

g.title: Continuously monitors all Raft safety properties.

ul.li: Lock Ordering: Single RWMutex per node. Always acquire mu before accessing log or currentTerm.
Chaos controller selects random alive nodes via maybeKillNodeLocked().
Quorum preservation check: if len(killedNodes) >= MaxKilledNodes { return }.
Use sync.Cond for state machine application.

g.title: At most one leader per term.
Leader has all committed entries from previous terms.
Nodes apply same commands at same index in same order.
Randomly kills nodes while preserving quorum safety.
Injects network partitions to test leader redirects.

g.text: Step 3: Network Partition & Split Brain Test
Safety Check: Terms T1 vs T2

g.title: Continuously monitors all Raft safety properties.
At most one leader per term.
